entries.gt_00f5df6ac918dc: Lida on the right is coughing more quietly. That means she is worse, or smarter.
entries.gt_019995542898fb: Move the queue with your eyes, not your elbows.
entries.gt_022a1f2bd6d7f6: They wrote me into quarantine in pencil. Then the pencil broke.
entries.gt_07155f9f857849: Living Zone: hermodoor of the quarantine ward after clearing.
entries.gt_07dcf7911bee6c: Mira Triage: "Pass this to Olga Dmitrievna: quarantine has one dose, one certificate, and a bad hermodoor. Let the medical post decide the order before we start arguing by the bed."
entries.gt_07f17506c0298f: I am angry not from character. This is my third shift counting who is still warm.
entries.gt_0bf30f1649d4db: Mira Triage: "Spend the sanitary kit on triage: treat the screen, the bed, and the hands. It will not come back to you."
entries.gt_0d1e8896de9558: The only antibiotic dose was given to Lida Temperature.
entries.gt_0e230d8fa7793f: If you dig through the cabinets without clearance, the logbook will call it a regime violation.
entries.gt_14f21775894caf: If the logbook asks, you were just helping the door stay a door.
entries.gt_15433b717d3e68: Do not open quarantine during the siren. Not even out of pity.
entries.gt_1959ef8e7b5b1b: Living Zone: far quarantine bed of the hospital block.
entries.gt_225372b836d0c5: If you bring the medcard, I will issue what the logbook calls gratitude.
entries.gt_277f0bebb1e8a4: If you take the certificate, say I did not touch my face. I really tried.
entries.gt_29515c9b391f4e: The dose went to Yura; Lida stayed in the quarantine queue.
entries.gt_2bebd236a03859: Take the antidepressant. The morgue is generous only on paper.
entries.gt_2c0147eb8e1ea8: The only antibiotic dose was given to Yura Moldy.
entries.gt_30748e991ce227: Temperature under the arm, certificate on the table, hands away from the face.
entries.gt_30d2c3c4988f3b: If the patient keeps quiet about sleep, I ask the orderly. The orderly is meaner, but more exact.
entries.gt_37942b881427d7: Varvara Morgue: "Get the quarantine medcard from the card archive. Without it, the patient is listed twice."
entries.gt_3a6b6821618996: The quarantine certificate is clean while the patient keeps quiet.
entries.gt_400c0d487119f6: Olga has been given the quarantine message about the missing dose and the hermodoor.
entries.gt_401e09cc55b8b0: Do not read the back of the medcard in the queue. It has addresses and the ward opening time.
entries.gt_4dd3f0b24ec1ff: Behind the hermodoor there are two. There is one antibiotic. You will have to decide with your hands, not the instructions.
entries.gt_4e4bc08f45de16: I need the quarantine medcard. Not a copy, not a rumor, not a tag.
entries.gt_519882020eedfc: Purple fog does not eat lungs, but sleep. Then the person opens the door himself.
entries.gt_519ce46ee57a40: The medcard came back. The patient has not. That is normal order.
entries.gt_55213e3f9bc8c2: Find an antibiotic and I will give you the medcard. It no longer helps me.
entries.gt_58c79ab5472146: Olga received the quarantine message; the medical post made the decision on the dose, certificate, and hermodoor.
entries.gt_601b45a07bce08: When I get out, first I will fix the lock from the inside.
entries.gt_617fff281af7d8: The orderly counts us by beds. If a bed is empty, he calls Taras.
entries.gt_628594777b5b7e: A former patient is walking inside. No queue anymore.
entries.gt_645ddfe8709453: If the filter is dirty, replace it. If the filter sings, call a Liquidator.
entries.gt_6de28c1f5ff35a: Do not stand in the passage. Stretchers do not know how to ask politely.
entries.gt_71c9577f928afc: You have the referral. The psychiatrist likes traces like that.
entries.gt_7edd6292a24d53: The fever let go. Or it just got colder.
entries.gt_8074ac49a5903b: The certificate is dry. That is already half the diagnosis.
entries.gt_814d80d5247ef3: The bandages did not run out today. Today it became noticeable.
entries.gt_82149ea309d9af: Lida Temperature: "Bring an antibiotic. If I get the dose first, I will give you the psychiatrist referral."
entries.gt_8a3355e141f8cf: Living Zone: ward behind the hermodoor of the hospital quarantine.
entries.gt_8bb6642551e849: Show the filter before your face. Anyone who touched their face after the fog goes to the end of triage.
entries.gt_8be4cd60b4fa2d: In the card archive, the cabinet is locked for honest people. The others manage faster.
entries.gt_8e3d8447dadda4: Remove the deadman and I will issue the sanitary kit. Do not play hero with no exit.
entries.gt_8f105b4d463d10: Taras Sanitary Pass: "There is a deadman walking in the quarantine ward. Remove him before he reaches the logbook."
entries.gt_8f7e9f7f96057a: Do not read the hermodoor logbook aloud. It has the surnames of people still to be found.
entries.gt_9253a6d1096cff: OVS after purple fog starts not with coughing, but with insomnia and someone else's decisions.
entries.gt_98321fba55147b: The quarantine deadman was cleared before leaving the ward.
entries.gt_a37fc1214197fe: The quarantine desk crossed the fake medical corner out of the treatment queue.
entries.gt_a3af0517cde8eb: You can spend the sanitary kit, steal the medicine, seal the ward, or report to Olga Dmitrievna. She will say what matters more to the medical post: certificate, dose, or hermodoor.
entries.gt_a7a4d186a6c049: Quarantine does not heal. It makes risk understandable to the logbook.
entries.gt_adf268bb41659b: I need an antibiotic. I will give the referral if I live to the signature.
entries.gt_adf4960eea2272: You can hide an infected person only until rounds. After that, the door hides him already.
entries.gt_b577a051d9fe63: Yura is coughing behind the screen. He asked for medicine too. I heard.
entries.gt_b5833946177eef: The dose went to Lida; Yura stayed in the quarantine queue.
entries.gt_b9b440408ba6c0: Living Zone: from the quarantine block, return to the assembly hall to Olga Dmitrievna.
entries.gt_be6fa4cfc9f07a: The receiving ward works by visible signs: blood, cough, stamp.
entries.gt_c034b3691f116b: The quarantine post holds the door while the hinge has not sagged and no one has torn off the seal.
entries.gt_c46cc8b31d4dc0: The morgue has no bodies right now, but it has medcards. That is even worse.
entries.gt_c8803228110b71: After OVS I cannot sleep. I lie there and hear the filter drying.
entries.gt_ca0eb846389a7d: The quarantine ward was sealed with sealant after clearing.
entries.gt_cc8740af74c5f0: Breathing got easier. The paper is probably heavier.
entries.gt_d2bacd85ee8bbf: Living Zone: right quarantine bed of the hospital block.
entries.gt_dbf8f37dd70b9c: The sanitary kit was spent on triage of the quarantine block.
entries.gt_dc8a537cd6806c: Taras Sanitary Pass: "Have a tube of sealant? We will close the ward as quarantine, not as a request. After that, entry only by logbook."
entries.gt_df38340306ef28: Mold is not a disease, they say. Then why is the door on the outside?
entries.gt_e1104ae10e4cb1: If the door is closed, that means I am still officially inside.
entries.gt_e1c622640517a2: The sanitary kit is yours. Do not spend it on scratches to pride.
entries.gt_e825e1e8e43192: Do not tell Yura I asked first. He hears everything as it is.
entries.gt_e880aa3165e000: Opened the leaf, close it behind you. Fog moves through a crack faster than a person.
entries.gt_ee2aadcbb61e45: Yura Moldy: "Bring an antibiotic. I will give you the medcard - it is worse than a bandage to me now."
entries.gt_f385d3b71851e1: You have the medcard. If it starts getting warm, do not put it by the bread.
entries.gt_fa521e5a63ea8a: Minus one patient without a medcard. Easier to count that way.
entries.gt_fdd5cc13e608c6: Living Zone: receiving desk of the hospital quarantine.
entries.gt_0b8e8b84fb9127: If the pot lid bulges again, I will call the Liquidators.
entries.gt_103c942d368ccd: Quiet. The receiver is catching numbers through the load-bearing wall. It sounds like interference, but too even.
entries.gt_1d3c20fbc9437e: An eye flew in from the ventilation and sat on the frequency. Now it blinks in Morse rhythm.
entries.gt_2712a10a72d98c: A hermodoor does not save you. The habit of checking the gasket before the siren saves you.
entries.gt_2aced137144bab: Yesterday they brought in a left boot. Today a resident came without a right one: that means accounting works.
entries.gt_2b9c7db196d166: If Pasha asked, I was not here. If he did not ask, even more so.
entries.gt_2c45b2819f3040: The radio club is hissing at night again. The kids there are not catching Moscow, but something between the walls.
entries.gt_2e8043708f56b3: I have the logbook again. Half the surnames are moving, but that is already order.
entries.gt_3730a7610f7c98: I fix iron, and iron takes fingers. So I walk slowly.
entries.gt_3c051265cfc3eb: The shelves are full. Today at least you can see what is missing.
entries.gt_43261e42fc2f7e: Gleb Soldering Iron: "Knock the eye out of the radio club. It blinks on my frequency."
entries.gt_46319f363aee92: Gleb asked me not to touch the receiver. I touched it. Now it wrote my birthday in the interference log.
entries.gt_49ed3cdc457de3: After the siren, do not stand by the glass. The frame warped, and the shards are still in the sill.
entries.gt_50b0f936e3a222: Uncle Pasha: "Bring any note. I will paste it into the visitor log before the real log comes back."
entries.gt_5116ef046d0a0a: I need a bandage. Not for people. For the fingers the door took during inspection.
entries.gt_52e5c5eb153814: Do not take the knife from the sink. It is listed to the kitchen, not to you.
entries.gt_5b2bd7d44e4c15: Semyon from repairs dragged off my box of tags again. Says hermodoors get lost too.
entries.gt_5c24fb547e1f4b: Kirill Runner: "Tell Rita the jacket is still on me. Let her not file it as lost."
entries.gt_5f0e833e11518d: Rita says I lost my jacket. I am standing in it. She says: for now.
entries.gt_6231fb852f2889: During samosbor, do not stand in the repair corridor. There is no hermoseal there, just a draft and a box of bolts.
entries.gt_65bb7d00b8c100: Rita Finds: "Bring bread. Lost things are demanding a ration today."
entries.gt_6cd4a85fe7465e: If you hear your address on the air, do not answer. Write down the time and cut the power.
entries.gt_6f10d85b78de6e: The tea got cold. That means the night was real.
entries.gt_71115bd36f9c02: I will pass it on if the air names your room again.
entries.gt_72790987f41b4e: Thanks for the bread. I am not asking whose it was.
entries.gt_7448d604399626: If they speak behind the door in your voice, hit the hinges and do not open the leaf.
entries.gt_7725340cae19fd: The lost things room loses nothing. It only waits until the owner stops arguing.
entries.gt_79afac64b4e423: Rita thinks I steal tags. I take only the ones already hanging on broken doors.
entries.gt_7a588f023f0ba4: The frequency is cleaner now. You can hear the pipe and the dispatcher, without blinking from the ventilation.
entries.gt_7fde5a51d737aa: Come through. Today you look like a resident.
entries.gt_8006497a08161e: The visitor log is missing. Without the logbook, I do not know who is a real resident.
entries.gt_83799989c71806: In the kitchen, the stain looks like a map. I saw our block there and the drain that needs sealing.
entries.gt_87a936cfbd9111: If you find someone else's note with the watch stamp, do not read it aloud.
entries.gt_8b31170f79f49d: Go to Pasha and tell him to stop slamming the door. It makes soup fly onto the logbook.
entries.gt_925ab4c356839f: Semyon Hermoseam: "Bring a bandage. The door bit my hand, and I bit back the swearing."
entries.gt_95b3355fa96353: If you lose something, come right away. Later the thing will leave on someone else's receipt.
entries.gt_a049194ecb0f4f: If you find my jacket before I lose it, do not give it back.
entries.gt_a2c9f4d8594264: Semyon gave me a nut for luck. The nut is heavier than luck.
entries.gt_a335475cd3029f: The medicine helped. Now my hands shake on schedule.
entries.gt_a5192ea6cba349: I delivered it. Or I was delivered. Little difference.
entries.gt_aa2214c63423df: Someone knocked over a stool here and left through the reserve passage. I recorded it as truancy.
entries.gt_ac66702a581b2a: Hear a slam with no door? That means the leaf came off its hinges. Look for a draft.
entries.gt_ae892faebebd56: Hold the compote tighter. Glasses here like to fall before the siren.
entries.gt_b4b4dc501b19b0: Tamara Boiling Water: "Tell Pasha not to slam the door. Soup flies onto the logbook, and then everyone curses."
entries.gt_c41e81d0144299: The cook is complaining again? Tell her: I will put a rag under the door, and she should stop putting soup on the logbook.
entries.gt_c799db025a0c2b: The porridge is normal. If there is a film on top, remove it with a spoon and do not argue.
entries.gt_cc879e8d221f4f: I soldered an antenna out of spoons. Now the kitchen comes in better than the dispatcher.
entries.gt_cebceceebc64fb: Do not touch the red cabinet. It holds the things of those who are not lost yet.
entries.gt_d373fd82231ee2: In the common kitchen, even the pots argue. Today the empty one won.
entries.gt_d756c6235f35f8: The concierge room holds because I do not sleep. Sleep here immediately becomes a pass for strangers.
entries.gt_de4564f642122f: Sign into the logbook. Even if you were here yesterday: without a line, I did not see you.
entries.gt_df2879ba0639cd: The radio club is officially for children. Unofficially, the children left, and the receiver stayed in charge.
entries.gt_e6b56080053cc6: Tamara Boiling Water: "Go into the common kitchen and see where the wet stain by the drain is pulling from."
entries.gt_e77b680c9617da: If you find an item with your name on it, leave it with me. First we check the tag and the date.
entries.gt_e7c7f6eb3b7353: The energy cell holds the signal. The bad part is, the battery will die before the end of the message.
entries.gt_e87abed035f656: Gleb Soldering Iron: "Need an energy cell. The receiver almost caught the end of the message."
entries.gt_e972e6e01d88f8: I run between the watch and the kitchen. If you walk slowly, the corridor has time to change its mind.
entries.gt_eba54cd3431ca8: Food disappears faster than applications. Bring bread and I will issue honest compensation.
entries.gt_eed8d7cf31d219: When the siren howls, the kitchen stays a kitchen. Only the corridor outside becomes someone else's.
entries.gt_ef9c07e33d5ac9: Pasha heard? Good. That means tomorrow the soup will not go into the logbook instead of lunch.
entries.gt_f13004435e2acf: Running got easier. The corridor is lazy today.
entries.gt_fa694f73f5b61f: Repairs is alive. Let the corridor outside fix itself.
entries.gt_fe69c3d53cf97f: I need an energy cell. Not for a weapon. To hear the end of the phrase.
entries.gt_0095af636ec788: Do not look for an altar here. Under the bed there is dust, receipts, and one box not meant for rounds.
entries.gt_0a8d65b7617c83: A route remains a route until someone carries it off to boast.
entries.gt_0b8ca7bedd7a31: The player remained the trusted courier of the quiet neighbor.
entries.gt_0e0afeca5f1dae: Barney sniffs out other people's notes anyway. Want to turn me in? Do it briefly, before he asks you first.
entries.gt_1122b254676989: Nina Pavlovna gave a quiet route note for the external cell.
entries.gt_12ed45ce39101e: Silence is work too. People just rarely thank you for it aloud.
entries.gt_225a100bb4661c: Nina's quiet route was sold to the loud cult
entries.gt_2cc1922c884bba: I did not see the palm. I saw the calendar, and everyone has enough calendars.
entries.gt_38b92b95581d91: I am not from the temple. The temple is noisy. I just know which door stays a door after the siren.
entries.gt_3e2117d2297000: The route is dry until the second pipe. After that, do not pray, count steps.
entries.gt_440c3b07c80acc: If you are not taking the paper to Barney, do not carry it on your tongue either.
entries.gt_594fe3ee2e30c7: If you go lower, do not take the left turn by the wet radiator. There the Liquidators write down disappearances, not routes.
entries.gt_5a376f4a2ed9b8: The quiet neighbor noticed the theft from the route cabinet
entries.gt_5bafabce98fe3c: Vanka: "The quiet auntie is hiding a mark? Bring the tag from the box behind the calendar. Quickly: if the mark is cult, I want to trade the address before night, not sit beside it and wait."
entries.gt_5c9735facf551c: Do not stand in the doorway, neighbor. There is a draft, and drafts now walk around with questions.
entries.gt_60b57688fae74c: Take the bread. Later you can decide for yourself whether it was help or debt.
entries.gt_630cccfc145432: Good. Sometimes the strongest lock is a neighbor who did not go to the kitchen to chatter.
entries.gt_690306bcf78e96: Nina's route receipt was handed to the Liquidators as an external cell address.
entries.gt_6c3c3814fb9261: Keep the receipt dry. Wet paper confesses faster to the wrong people.
entries.gt_818c53734db2ea: The player left the quiet neighbor's route without denunciation or sale.
entries.gt_8778e0b2036204: The external cell route was exchanged for a verified lower-water lead.
entries.gt_892d4605643dfb: You do not knock twice at a quiet door. The second knock is already for those counting witnesses.
entries.gt_915dfc1aa077dc: You can live simpler: do not ask who gave the route, and come back with water.
entries.gt_92bdbb0ea89e77: A black palm on the jamb? Soot from the boiler room. Only children do not leave marks like that on someone else's door.
entries.gt_9718787dfb4700: Nina speaks normally. That is the frightening part: normal words hide debt better.
entries.gt_99c9854666ac11: Do not show Vanka the papers right away. He hears the price before the meaning.
entries.gt_9ba42db5cafbeb: The player accepted the quiet sign of the external cell
entries.gt_9ca569425ac48a: If anyone asks, I am just a neighbor. Just neighbors keep debt lists too.
entries.gt_b341a18c28062c: A dry receipt is lighter than a wet denunciation.
entries.gt_bc24860789435b: The external cell route was exchanged for a lower-water lead
entries.gt_c463490912c7c5: The calendar hangs crooked because there is a box behind it. Not every cache should be opened in front of neighbors.
entries.gt_cd88280e29dc6c: Nina Pavlovna: "Two packs of Prima on the common table. Whoever brings smoke without questions gets shown the door without a queue."
entries.gt_d5af9eede98b75: Tamara Dry: "If you are keeping the route, tell Nina in one sentence. No Barney, no Vanka, no common kitchen."
entries.gt_d8b9bdaa7f29ba: Nina Pavlovna: "Bread on the table, neighbor. Then I will tell you why the mark behind the calendar leads not to you, but to the reserve door."
entries.gt_d979fce73adab4: The external cell route was left without witnesses
entries.gt_dbf51666aab510: Neighbors remain neighbors, even when each has their own list of doors.
entries.gt_df7cb9be6c3b2c: Big words have nothing to do with it, dear. Someone simply has to remember whom you owe.
entries.gt_e4bab675ce2d65: The external cell address was given to the Liquidators
entries.gt_e53518023f7f2b: A quiet door is not thanked aloud. Later they find it by your voice.
entries.gt_e55cfbc26b364f: Not in front of the neighbors, dear. Neighbors have common ears and personal debts.
entries.gt_e97ad487835d15: The tag from Nina's cache was given to Vanka; he traded the address for protection and three packs of cigarettes.
entries.gt_e9b14d53e3592e: Barney: "If the neighbor is trading quiet doors, bring the route receipt from her cabinet. We will write the words in later ourselves."
entries.gt_fcb76f8652c277: I only said the route. What you did with it is already your biography.
entries.gt_fd6fb3d2609089: Yakov Davidovich: "By Nina's model, the route is incomplete. Go down to the Collectors and come back with a mark that it leads down at all."
entries.gt_ff2436acd62d16: The palm behind the calendar is not for beauty. It is so our own do not knock loudly.
entries.gt_0837de5d9e8f5c: If someone says to leave now, I will leave. Just say it loudly, in front of witnesses.
entries.gt_0e6b9ebf637400: If you came to refuse, the door is right there. Refusal costs nothing.
entries.gt_1109b4fca742de: Pavel Collateral: "Close my thirty-six rubles. I will leave here without a new entry."
entries.gt_1d5d16e4dba0dd: Take it for money and leave without a surname in the notebook. Take it on debt and the surname stays here.
entries.gt_1de21095efce3d: If you reach into the box, know this: I saw where it stands.
entries.gt_21f87f759b2b26: The rumor went quiet. That kind is sometimes better than a shot.
entries.gt_272ff566cb32ea: If you give the receipt to me, Trofim becomes a sample under observation, not a reason for a raid.
entries.gt_2f6b930cac7a15: Purchase in the smoke room paid without a debt record
entries.gt_3dd26b3eceecc2: The supply is finite. People for some reason act as if only other people are finite.
entries.gt_402aa083cd5ed6: I sit by the door not from curiosity. Someone has to remember who came in without debt.
entries.gt_46035ae43f103c: Pavel can still leave. He needs an outside voice, not heroics.
entries.gt_4f9f18e2e7729d: Markelov from the raid: "Need a denunciation from the debt cashbox. With paper, we will close it without shooting."
entries.gt_56eb40558fea5d: The debt is closed, or at least named aloud. My chest is still smoky.
entries.gt_65c2f38cc5a604: Debtors can be pitied. Notebooks cannot.
entries.gt_6b67100950d15f: Rita Lab Worker: "Bring the receipt from the notebook. We will take Trofim under record and lead the debtors out without a raid."
entries.gt_77b0ca87891364: Trofim the Smoker: "Twenty-four rubles up front - three roll-ups with no notebook entry. If you do not smoke, just leave."
entries.gt_7a197dbfd9e1b4: Only my hands touch the box. Other hands get shown to witnesses afterward.
entries.gt_82220b18cf9b96: You can simply refuse and lead the man out. That is also a decision.
entries.gt_8479a2a55d4237: Klava Witness: "Tell Pavel in front of people: do not take debt, leave now. He is {dir}."
entries.gt_86eac21d8fbc1f: Thirty-six rubles is not a price. It is a reason to come for me in the evening.
entries.gt_9d2af305c1aa4e: A raid without shooting is rare. Do not turn it into a holiday.
entries.gt_9e2bfcfca34883: I did not smoke for fun. I wanted to stop hearing the children behind the wall.
entries.gt_9fc188dd8dca7f: People do not rest here. They pay for five minutes without questions from the corridor.
entries.gt_a791e4cb49c66c: The smoke room was handed to the Liquidators by statement
entries.gt_a8ba2abf32d5f0: If you bought it yourself, do not tell me like it was a heroic deed.
entries.gt_a8f22e5b90dc0e: Bring a denunciation or a receipt, and I will close the room without shooting.
entries.gt_ae891c9553b8a2: The room is on the statement. Whoever was inside now speaks more quietly.
entries.gt_af653b2d9f37bd: Someone else's debt in the smoke room was closed with money
entries.gt_afb5ba8dbffc27: I will go to the neighbors. Here even silence costs money.
entries.gt_b933bd79e05b02: We do not need smoke, but a statement: who sells, who owes, who coughs afterward.
entries.gt_c7a6c18070ed86: No one forces anyone to smoke. Refusal is cheaper than any drag.
entries.gt_cd7855ca4cafe2: We have the statement. The smoke room is no longer a market, but a protocol.
entries.gt_d00c497683acb4: He left. The room stayed, but one person did not lie down in the notebook.
entries.gt_d94f908b741cd3: Without paper it is smoke. With paper it is a raid point.
entries.gt_ebb1acf7d60076: The dealer was transferred under scientific accounting instead of a raid
entries.gt_ec06573b3ae737: This is not an excuse. It is a way to remove pressure without a fight in the corridor.
entries.gt_f84a9d04772f0f: The debtor was led out of credit smoke by conversation
entries.gt_fa1ff4372ef62c: Pavel will get water and an exam. Trofim gets accounting. Better than a night raid.
entries.gt_ff3a603d3eeb5d: No debt entry today. This is not mercy, just the cashbox balanced.
entries.gt_0a6c246299fbff: Sometimes the worst decision looks like order too.
entries.gt_0d7dad39339af4: I will pass Yakov Davidovich only the protocol: weight, color, time the tray was opened.
entries.gt_0e907b377dc2ba: The White Prislushka source is covered with sealant.
entries.gt_1098d7ff4e1e2d: White Prislushka: the screen asks for quieter. If the witness repeats one phrase, block her view, lead her away from the door, seal the source after the people.
entries.gt_12e2708dff729f: Stepan Quiet Door: "Seal the white source with sealant. Do not burn it in front of Anya: first remove the gaze, then cover the stain."
entries.gt_15f83e1d853fa3: The White Prislushka witness was written off with a receipt.
entries.gt_1863db6796d8e3: Living Zone: White Prislushka, sealant is by the tool shelf or brought by you.
entries.gt_221b7c39f93959: I was led away from the door. The phrase stayed where it belongs.
entries.gt_244a87ede5ed96: White Prislushka: the witness was written off by the door.
entries.gt_2a8476dfdb8158: Living Zone: White Prislushka, the receipt lies on the table by the warning screen.
entries.gt_2e43e3f9580a92: The white presses not on the door, but on the eyes. That is why we turn people with their backs to it.
entries.gt_4db36c76b47716: Matte Tray of the White Prislushka
entries.gt_50b6c5628a8bcd: The source is covered. Now between it and people there is sealant, iron, and a signature.
entries.gt_5a78bf493d4791: If the door opens by itself, do not hit Anya. Lead her behind your back and hit what came out.
entries.gt_5c7cb80b54e4cc: If I start listening to the wall again, block my view, not my mouth.
